scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync(process.argv[1], { recursive: true, force: true })" dist && node scripts/copy-assets.js
scripts.build:dev: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync(process.argv[1], { recursive: true, force: true })" dist && node scripts/copy-assets.js --dev
scripts.build:prod: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync(process.argv[1], { recursive: true, force: true })" dist && node scripts/copy-assets.js
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); for (const path of process.argv.slice(1)) fs.rmSync(path, { recursive: true, force: true })" dist package
